title: SCENTORINI Scented Sachets Jasmine Fragrance - Hanging Floral Wardrobe Freshener Drawer Deodorizer Bags - 14pcs Natural Long Lasting Sachet for Closet, Car, Linen, Gift Use
features: Soothing Jasmine Scent - Infused with a soft, floral jasmine fragrance, these scented sachets uplift your space with a clean and tranquil aroma, perfect for creating a calm and inviting atmosphere
Convenient Hanging Use - Designed with a practical hanging string, each sachet easily attaches to wardrobes, closets, cars, or gym bags—bringing elegant freshness wherever it goes
Stylish Individual Packaging - Every fragrance bag comes individually sealed with jasmine-inspired artwork, combining visual charm with practicality—great for gifts or everyday luxury
Natural & Gentle Formula - These floral sachets deliver a long-lasting and subtle scent that won’t overpower, ideal for sensitive noses and shared spaces
Generous 14pc Set - With 14 individual jasmine scented bags, you can scent multiple rooms at once or enjoy extended use—value-packed for consistent home fragrance appeal
